TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Takaray a sowal O kakawit hananay i, o mamangay a kawkaw, o kamit hananay ko roma a pangangan, o sapipanay a po'ot, itini i sawalian a niyaro' o minik hananay ko kamit. ona kakawit hananay a sowal i, ira ho ko roma a imi nona tilid, o sapikawit to kakawiten a dafong.
S.PHON: takaraj a so~uwaɾ o~u kakawit ħananaj i, o~u mamaŋaj a kawkaw, o~u kamit ħananaj ko~u ro~uma a paŋaŋan, o~u sapipanaj a po~uʡo~ut, itini i sawaɾian a nijaro~uʡ o~u minik ħananaj ko~u kamit. o~una kakawit ħananaj a so~uwaɾ i, ira ħo~u ko~u ro~uma a imi no~una tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u sapikawit to~u kakawitən a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ.
S.FORM: Takaray a sowal O kakawit hananay i, o mamangay a kawkaw, o kamit hananay ko roma a pangangan, o sapipanay a po'ot, itini i sawalian a niyaro' o minik hananay ko kamit. ona kakawit hananay a sowal i, ira ho ko roma a imi nona tilid, o sapikawit to kakawiten a dafong.
S.PHON: takaraj a so~uwaɾ o~u kakawit ħananaj i, o~u mamaŋaj a kawkaw, o~u kamit ħananaj ko~u ro~uma a paŋaŋan, o~u sapipanaj a po~uʡo~ut, itini i sawaɾian a nijaro~uʡ o~u minik ħananaj ko~u kamit. o~una kakawit ħananaj a so~uwaɾ i, ira ħo~u ko~u ro~uma a imi no~una tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u sapikawit to~u kakawitən a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ.
